title: Tri Love Bracelet – Set of 3 Crystal Bracelets
short_description: A thoughtfully designed trio of stretch crystal bracelets in Rose Quartz, Howlite and Amethyst, finished with a silver-toned owl charm. Wear all three together or style them your own way.
body_html:
Celebrate love in all its forms with the Tri Love Bracelet — a thoughtfully designed set of three crystal bracelets that represents self-love, emotional harmony and peaceful connection.

The trio brings together soft Rose Quartz beads, calming white Howlite, soothing purple Amethyst and polished silver-toned accents. One bracelet is finished with a detailed owl charm, adding a symbolic touch of wisdom, awareness and thoughtful love.

Wear all three together for a layered crystal statement or style them separately according to your mood. With their soft colours, delicate faceted beads and flexible slip-on construction, these bracelets fit naturally into everyday, festive and gifting looks.

Why choose it?

  • Three bracelets in one set — coordinated crystal bracelets you can wear together, individually or share with someone special.
  • Love-inspired crystal combination — Rose Quartz, Howlite and Amethyst create a soft blend associated with love, calmness and emotional balance.
  • Meaningful owl charm — the silver-toned owl adds character and traditionally represents wisdom, intuition and awareness.
  • Soft, elegant palette — pale pink, white, purple and silver tones give the set a clean, graceful look.
  • Flexible slip-on design — each bracelet uses a stretch-style construction for easy everyday wear.

Key highlights

  • Set of three coordinated bracelets
  • Rose Quartz, Howlite and Amethyst beads
  • Detailed silver-toned owl charm
  • Polished silver-toned spacer beads
  • Soft pink, white and purple colour palette
  • Flexible stretch-style construction
  • Wear together or separately, ideal for gifting

Crystal properties are based on traditional beliefs and are not intended as medical claims.
seo_title: Tri Love Bracelet – Rose Quartz Crystal Set of 3
seo_description: Set of 3 stretch crystal bracelets in Rose Quartz, Howlite & Amethyst with a silver-toned owl charm. Soft, elegant & gift-ready. COD & free shipping over ₹499.

metafields.highlights: Set of 3 coordinated crystal bracelets · Rose Quartz, Howlite & Amethyst beads · Silver-toned owl charm · Polished silver-tone spacers · Flexible slip-on stretch fit · Wear together or separately
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Natural Rose Quartz, Howlite and Amethyst crystal beads with silver-toned alloy owl charm and spacer beads on a flexible elastic stretch cord.
metafields.care_or_directions: Slip on gently over the hand; avoid over-stretching the elastic. Keep away from water, perfume and sweat to protect the shine. Wipe with a soft dry cloth and store flat in a pouch.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: How many bracelets are in the set?
faqs.a: You receive a coordinated set of three bracelets — one Rose Quartz, one Howlite-and-Rose-Quartz, and one accented with Amethyst and a silver-toned owl charm.
The trio uses natural Rose Quartz, white Howlite and purple Amethyst beads, paired with polished silver-toned spacers and an owl charm.
Each bracelet has a flexible stretch-style construction that slips on easily and fits most wrist sizes comfortably — no clasp needed.

faqs.q: Can I wear the three separately?
faqs.a: Yes. Stack all three for a layered crystal look or wear them one at a time to match your mood or outfit.
Absolutely. The soft love-inspired palette and meaningful crystal combination make it a thoughtful gift for birthdays, festivals or a loved one.

faqs.q: Do the crystals have real healing powers?
faqs.a: The crystal meanings we share are based on traditional beliefs and are not intended as medical claims — they are a symbolic, feel-good part of wearing the set.

page_blocks.subtitle: Set of 3 Crystals | Love-Inspired Palette | Slip-On Everyday Fit
page_blocks.product_brief: The Tri Love Bracelet is a set of three stretch crystal bracelets built around love, calm and balance. Soft Rose Quartz, marbled Howlite and gentle Amethyst come together with polished silver-toned accents and a symbolic owl charm. Wear all three stacked or style them one at a time.
page_blocks.what_we_put_in:
✦ Rose Quartz Beads – the traditional crystal of love, for self-acceptance and emotional warmth
✦ Howlite Beads – marbled white stones linked to patience, relaxation and a steady mind
✦ Amethyst Beads – gentle purple accents associated with peace, clarity and balance
✦ Silver-Toned Owl Charm – a symbolic touch of wisdom, intuition and awareness
✦ Metallic Spacer Beads – polished silver-tone accents that add shine and separation
✦ Flexible Stretch Cord – durable elastic that slips on easily with no clasp
page_blocks.product_benefits:
✨ Three bracelets, one set
A coordinated trio you can wear together, individually or share with someone special.
✨ Love-inspired crystal combination
Rose Quartz, Howlite and Amethyst are traditionally tied to love, calmness and emotional balance.
✨ Meaningful owl charm
The silver-toned owl adds character and symbolises wisdom, intuition and awareness.
✨ Soft, elegant palette
Pale pink, white, purple and silver tones give the set a clean, graceful appearance.
✨ Easy slip-on wear
Flexible stretch construction fits most wrists and moves with you all day.
✨ Everyday to gifting ready
Styles effortlessly into daily, festive and gifting looks.
page_blocks.product_details:
Plating: Silver-tone
Base Metal: Alloy accents with natural crystal beads
Color: Pink, White, Purple, Silver
Finish: Polished faceted crystal beads
Closure: Flexible slip-on stretch cord
detail_points: 💗 Set of 3 love-inspired crystal bracelets in one box
🦉 Silver-toned owl charm for wisdom and awareness
💜 Rose Quartz, Howlite & Amethyst natural beads
🤝 Slip-on stretch fit that suits most wrists
page_blocks.product_specification:
Product Name: Tri Love Bracelet (Set of 3)
Design: Stretch crystal bead bracelets with silver-toned owl charm
Material: Rose Quartz, Howlite, Amethyst beads with silver-toned alloy accents
Net Quantity: 3 bracelets
Country of Origin: India
page_blocks.how_to_use:
1. Gently slip each bracelet over your hand onto the wrist without over-stretching the elastic.
2. Stack all three together for a layered crystal look, or wear one at a time.
3. Keep away from water, perfume and sweat, and wipe with a soft dry cloth after wear.
4. Store flat in a soft pouch to protect the beads and silver-tone shine.
